summary: Phase 2 Incentive Dashboard: Backend (5/5 pytest pass) + Frontend (full UI flow pass). Verified Analytics sub-tabs, default month, summary badges, single-row per-employee badges, Approve action, Mark Paid dialog with UPI payment method, Synced-to-Financials badge, bulk Approve/Hold/Reset present (no bulk-pay), CSV export controls, and Performance regression. Backend confirmed: marking Paid creates a financial_transactions row (type=outflow, category=staff_incentive, payment_mode=upi, reference_type=incentive_payout) and persists linked_expense_id; idempotent on re-Paid.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py _recompute_incentive_payout: when status is moved away from Paid, linked_expense_id is intentionally kept and not removed — comment notes 'admin can manually delete from Financials'. Consider an explicit reverse-sync (delete or reverse-credit txn) to avoid orphan expense rows when Paid is reset.
IncentiveDashboard.handleBulk runs sequential awaits; for large salons this could be slow. Consider Promise.allSettled with concurrency cap.
Bulk-action select-all checkbox is rendered above rows but has no aria-label (only adjacent text). Minor a11y improvement.
Employee filter select uses 'all' sentinel correctly; eligible-barbers only lists is_barber=true (verified — Phase 1 regression OK).

After Mark Paid, the per-row 'Mark Paid' button correctly disables but 'Approve' and 'Hold' are also disabled via condition; UI keeps them visible — could be hidden post-Paid for cleaner UX, but functionality is correct.
seed_data_creation: Saved a salon reward plan via POST /api/salons/{id}/reward-plan (mode=all, multiplier=4, slabs=[{from_pct:100,to_pct:9999,type:additional_pct,value:5}]) and inserted ONE seed completed token (_seed_test=true, total_amount=120000) for barber 5d7d3064-2580-4a43-ae3e-73cdcaefd9de (Imran) so Imran's actual_sales > target. To clean: db.tokens.delete_many({_seed_test: true}). Imran's incentive_payout was marked Paid via UI/test (linked_expense_id created in financial_transactions).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Incentive Dashboard fully verified. Seeded reward-plan + 1 completed token (₹1,20,000) for Imran (barber_id 5d7d3064-...). Imran's current-month payout was marked Paid via UPI during testing — corresponding financial_transactions row exists (category=staff_incentive, type=outflow). All data-testids match spec: incentive-dashboard, incentive-month-input (defaults to current YYYY-MM), incentive-barber-filter, summary-{eligible|avg-ach|total|approved|paid|pending}, incentive-export-{from|to|btn}, bulk-{approve|hold|reset}-btn (NO bulk-pay-btn), bulk-select-all, select-{barber_id}, salary/target/actual/ach/earned-{barber_id}, approve/pay/hold/reset-{barber_id}, pay-dialog, pay-method-select, pay-confirm-btn, pay-cancel-btn, analytics-tab-{performance|incentives}. CSV export click triggers download (filename incentives_<from>_to_<to>.csv).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no defects found in Phase 2.
